sections.paragraph:
βούλομαι [etym. uncertain, perh. associated with βάλλω in sense of aiming at someth.]

—1. ‘have in one’s mind’, wish, want, desire Ac 25:22; 1 Ti 6:9; Phlm 13; Js 4:4.

—2. ‘reach a decision upon deliberation’, intend, decide, plan, will Mt 1:19; 11:27; Mk 15:15; Ac 5:28; 2 Cor 1:15; 1 Ti 2:8; 2 J 12; Jd 5. In J 18:39 in a deliberative question βούλεσϑε ἀπολύσω; shall I release? Of Jesus Lk 10:22; God Lk 22:42; Hb 6:17; Js 1:18 βουληϑείς according to his will; 2 Pt 3:9; the Holy Spirit 1 Cor 12:11.
